svg.title: 1024-byte memory core layout at peak allocation
svg.desc: 16 blocks of 64 bytes showing Task A (3 blocks), Task B (4 blocks), Task C (2 blocks), and 7 free blocks
svg.text: 16 blocks of 64 bytes each, first-fit placement

g.text: Task D requests 512 bytes but largest free = 448
External fragmentation: total free is sufficient, contiguous free is not
